_comment: Primary + fallback model IDs per AI provider. tash reads this at startup (see src/ai/model_defaults.cpp). Updating a model name here is a data change, not a code change — bump this file when Google/OpenAI rotate their SKUs. A compiled-in fallback inside model_defaults.cpp keeps the shell working if this file is missing. Last refreshed: 2026-04-18 (Google Gemini 3.1 family, OpenAI GPT-5.4 family).
